nasb.text: “Moreover, among the prophets of Samaria I saw an offensive thing: They prophesied by Baal and led My people Israel astray.

esv.text: In the prophets of Samaria I saw an unsavory thing: they prophesied by Baal and led my people Israel astray.

cnv.text: “在撒瑪利亞的先知中， 我看見可厭的事： 他們竟奉巴力的名說預言， 使我的子民以色列走錯了路。

ccb.text: 我看见撒玛利亚的先知行为可憎， 他们靠巴力说预言， 引诱我的子民走入歧途。
